reviews.comment:
Nafta carísima. De full solo el cartel.No está abastecida. Pases a la hora que pases no tienen nada.Siempre te ofrecen ir al restorán de al lado ( ACA).

(Translated by Google)
Gas is ridiculously expensive. It's only "full" on paper. It's never been refueled. No matter what time you go, they're always empty. They always try to take you to the restaurant next door (ACA).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGNU4wUnZVbGhpTjNSM1IwdHdRMWN6TTBzdGJrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un domingo de diciembre no tienen infinia diesel, no solo eso, que no entiendo, no sabía que era fin de semana? Ya estamos casi en temporada. Pero además, ni un cartel avisando, me comí la cola y el playero cuando le pido carga de infinia me dice solo tengo diesel común… ninguna pick up moderna acepta diesel común. Y le pregunto hay en Jacobaci? Es la siguiente ypf. No se…

(Translated by Google)
On a Sunday in December, they didn't have Infinia diesel. Not only that, which I don't understand, didn't they know it was the weekend? We're almost in season. But also, there wasn't even a sign warning us. I waited in line, and when I asked the attendant for Infinia, he said, "I only have regular diesel." No modern pickup truck can take regular diesel. And I asked him, "Is there any in Jacobaci? It's the next YPF." I don't know...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25KdFNIUTNXbFpaV2xBM1FuUkpaVU41WXpOWVRrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cuenta solo con dos baños para damas, la limpieza no es buena. Las heladeras vacías, a las 13 hs solo quedaban galletitas en paquetes.

(Translated by Google)
It only has two restrooms for women, and the cleanliness is poor. The refrigerators were empty; at 1 PM, only packaged cookies remained.

Good service, the beach attendants were very attentive, and it's easy to get to from anywhere.

reviews.comment:
Hace rato que no veía baños tan sucios en una estación de servicio. La parte del shop bastante triste. Para la cantidad de gente que circula, podrían prestarle mas atencion a las instalaciones. La atencion amable

(Translated by Google)
I haven't seen such dirty restrooms at a gas station in a long time. The convenience store area is quite sad. Considering the number of people who pass through, they could pay more attention to the facilities. The service was friendly.
